rationale: App is an AI-powered creation platform (AiForge). It requires a futuristic, highly energetic, premium feel. Using Deep Void Black as a matte base to ground vibrant neon cyan, green, and purple accents, avoiding 'cheap laser tag' by relying on crystal glassmorphism and subtle particles.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, dense but readable card layouts. Bottom navigation fixed to viewport. Viewport is restricted to max-w-md mx-auto for desktop to simulate mobile app feel, or responsive grid if full screen.

crystal_glass.usage: Bottom Navigation, Fixed Headers, Detail Overlays, Modals

cards.classes: bg-[#0A0A0E] rounded-3xl border border-white/5 overflow-hidden hover:border-white/15 transition-colors
cards.usage: Category Cards, Recent Creation items, Pricing Tiers

tracing_beam_card.classes: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-[#0A0A0E] border border-transparent before:absolute before:inset-0 before:-z-10 before:p-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-[#00F0FF] before:via-[#00FF66] before:to-[#B026FF] before:rounded-3xl before:content-['']
tracing_beam_card.usage: Neon Pro Pricing Tier, Upgrade CTA

animations.particles: Use TSParticles or Framer Motion to create a slow-moving, subtle starry nebula background behind the main content area.
animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion slide up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) with spring physics.
animations.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and inner glow intensifies.
animations.energetic_edges: Use a rotating conic-gradient mask on the border of the main 'Create' button to simulate lightning/energy running along the edge.

bottom_navigation.style: Fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 p-4 pb-safe crystal_glass rounded-t-3xl flex justify-between items-center

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00F0FF] via-[#00FF66] to-[#00F0FF] bg-[length:200%_auto] animate-gradient text-black font-black rounded-full px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wider shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,102,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors border border-white/10
buttons.danger: bg-red-500/20 text-red-500 border border-red-500/50 rounded-full px-4 py-2 hover:bg-red-500/30

icon_wrappers.image: relative z-10 p-3 rounded-2xl bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-green-500/20 before:blur-xl before:-z-10
icon_wrappers.video: relative z-10 p-3 rounded-2xl bg-cyan-500/10 text-cyan-400 before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-cyan-500/20 before:blur-xl before:-z-10
icon_wrappers.model3d: relative z-10 p-3 rounded-2xl bg-purple-500/10 text-purple-400 before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-purple-500/20 before:blur-xl before:-z-10

image_urls.description: Deep void space nebula with subtle shooting stars. Use as fixed background behind the app with low opacity (0.3).
Futuristic Robot Portrait. Use in the Recent Creations carousel/library as an Image example.
Ocean Waves on an Alien Planet. Use in the Recent Creations carousel/library as a Video example.
3D Holographic glowing cube. Use in the Recent Creations carousel/library as a 3D Model example.

instructions_to_main_agent: MUST load 'Unbounded' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.

Build this as a mobile-first web app using standard React + Tailwind. Limit the max-width of the main container to 'max-w-md mx-auto' with a border-x border-white/10 to mimic a mobile phone viewport on desktop screens, or make it fully responsive if preferred.
Implement the background using fixed positioning and the provided nebula background image with opacity-30, overlaid with an absolute black-to-transparent gradient from the bottom.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn cards for the main feed. Use custom raw div layouts to achieve the glowing borders and specific internal paddings.
For the bottom navigation, ensure it is fixed to the bottom, uses backdrop-blur-2xl, and does not overlap content (add pb-24 to the main wrapper).
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-creating-btn').
Integrate Shadcn primitives (Dialog, Select, Form) only for complex functional UI like Login/Settings/Pricing billing toggles. Custom-style them to fit the dark neon theme.
